prefixes.description:
Earlier drafts used `AR.*` identifiers for AR-owned claims, traits, profiles,
transformation behaviors, and artifacts.
Earlier drafts used `JR.*` for judicial-record domain identifiers.

Earlier drafts used `CR.*` for civic-record domain
identifiers.

Earlier drafts referenced upstream accountable-entity identifiers using
`AE.*`. AR now treats these as upstream mappings or referenced concepts rather
than AR-owned identifiers.
